'''dhayazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:huantajayite|huantajayite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-y-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:huantajayite|huantajayite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhayazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæyæzhæth|dhæyæzhæth]] || [[word:dhæyæzhæj|dhæyæzhæj]] || [[word:dhæyæzhæsh|dhæyæzhæsh]] || [[word:dhæyæzhæ|dhæyæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhayayazhath|dhayayazhath]] || [[word:dhayayazhaj|dhayayazhaj]] || [[word:dhayayazhash|dhayayazhash]] || [[word:dhayayazha|dhayayazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhayazhath|dhayazhath]] || [[word:dhayazhaj|dhayazhaj]] || [[word:dhayazhash|dhayazhash]] || [[word:dhayazha|dhayazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhayafzhath|dhayafzhath]] || [[word:dhayafzhaj|dhayafzhaj]] || [[word:dhayafzhash|dhayafzhash]] || [[word:dhayafzhaf|dhayafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhayazhatha|dhayazhatha]] || [[word:dhayazhaja|dhayazhaja]] || [[word:dhayazhasha|dhayazhasha]] || [[word:dhayazhaka|dhayazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhayazhath|dhayazhath]] || [[word:dhayazhaj|dhayazhaj]] || [[word:dhayazhash|dhayazhash]] || [[word:dhayazha|dhayazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhayazhathal|dhayazhathal]] || [[word:dhayazhajal|dhayazhajal]] || [[word:dhayazhashal|dhayazhashal]] || [[word:dhayazhakal|dhayazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhayazhathatha|dhayazhathatha]] || [[word:dhayazhajaja|dhayazhajaja]] || [[word:dhayazhashasha|dhayazhashasha]] || [[word:dhayazhaka|dhayazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhayazhathan|dhayazhathan]] || [[word:dhayazhajan|dhayazhajan]] || [[word:dhayazhashan|dhayazhashan]] || [[word:dhayazhakan|dhayazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhayazhathaoro|dhayazhathaoro]] || [[word:dhayazhajaoro|dhayazhajaoro]] || [[word:dhayazhashaoro|dhayazhashaoro]] || [[word:dhayazhakaoro|dhayazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
